Description: Club Strike — a crude but effective blow that deals solid physical damage.
DescriptionEn: Club Strike — a crude but effective blow that deals solid physical damage.
DescriptionFr: Coup de Massue — un coup brut mais efficace qui inflige de solides dégâts physiques.
DescriptionEffects: Deals 40 physical damage to one enemy.
DescriptionEffectsEn: Deals 40 physical damage to one enemy.
DescriptionEffectsFr: Inflige 40 dégâts physiques à un ennemi.
